items.description:

items.name: Minimal Clean Grey Fashion Cap
items.description:
Cap on Head 

Other Colors - https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Keyword=Cap&Category=1&CreatorName=Danuk%27s+Empire&CreatorType=Group&salesTypeFilter=1

More Cool UGCs - https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Category=1&CreatorName=Danuk%27s+Empire&CreatorType=Group&salesTypeFilter=1&SortType=3

A timeless piece of simplicity and style. The Minimal Clean White Fashion Cap is designed for those who appreciate a crisp, understated look that pairs effortlessly with any outfit. Made from soft, durable fabric, it offers comfort while maintaining a sleek and modern silhouette. Its pure white tone symbolizes clarity and confidence, making it the perfect accessory for casual walks, streetwear fits, or everyday wear. This cap isn’t just fashion — it’s a statement of minimal elegance and clean design.
